package.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Adventure Tour Package — Brahmaputra Rafting: Guwahati • Kaziranga • River Basin

highlights.text: Serial code AS-012 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-ASM-ADV-012
State / Country: Assam, India | Category: Luxury Adventure
Destinations Covered: Guwahati • Kaziranga • Brahmaputra River Basin
Ideal for: Thrill-Seekers, Wildlife Lovers & Corporate Retreats
Vehicle: Private Luxury AC 4x4 All-Terrain SUV with expert tracker-chauffeur | Meal Plan: Jungle MAPAI
Route Plan: Guwahati ➔ Kaziranga (3N) ➔ Brahmaputra River Excursions ➔ Guwahati (2N) ➔ Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private secluded sand-island picnic on the Brahmaputra with custom menu.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Every safari path, rafting route, and property personally vetted for safety and luxury.
Premium Handpicked Hotels: Boutique accommodations balancing modern luxury with natural surroundings.
Shopping: Fancy Bazar Muga silk sarees, hand-woven stoles, bamboo artifacts, Assamese fish curries.
Important Notes: Safaris weather-dependent; rafting depends on water levels; book properties 45-60 days ahead.

itinerary.title: TRAGUIN Premium Assam Adventure Tour Package — Brahmaputra Rafting: Guwahati • Kaziranga • River Basin
itinerary.tagline: Assam Adventure • Brahmaputra Rafting • Kaziranga • 05 Nights / 06 Days
itinerary.overview:
Adrenaline-infused high-end expedition through untamed Northeast India with luxury intertwined with raw wilderness.

TOUR OVERVIEW\nElite Brahmaputra Adventure: Guwahati ➔ Kaziranga (3N) ➔ River Excursions ➔ Guwahati (2N) with private rafting access and elite luxury camping amenities.

WHY UNDERTAKE THE PREMIUM ASSAM ADVENTURE?\nRhino safaris, Brahmaputra white-water rafting, Gangetic dolphins, misty Kaziranga sunrise frames, and ancient Guwahati spiritual landmarks.
itinerary.seo_title: AS-012 | Adventure Rafting Brahmaputra Kaziranga | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Assam adventure (AS-012 / TG-ASM-ADV-012): jeep safaris, Brahmaputra rafting, sand-island picnic, sunset cruise, Kamakhya VIP, 4-tier hotels.

highlights.text: Scenic 4x4 drive to Kaziranga with tribal campfire Day 01
Central and Western Range jeep safaris and Orchid Park Day 02
Brahmaputra rafting and Gangetic dolphin spotting Day 03
Return to Guwahati with premium sunset cruise Day 04
Kamakhya VIP, Umananda Island, and Muga silk weaving Day 05

days.title: GUWAHATI ARRIVAL | SCENIC HIGHWAY DRIVE TO KAZIRANGA WILDLIFE RESERVE
days.description: Traditional Gamosa welcome at Guwahati airport. Premium all-terrain 4x4 drive along Brahmaputra banks past tea estates to luxury wilderness lodge with open-air tribal campfire.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tea Estate Viewpoints, Forest Fringe Trail.
Evening Experience: Traditional Karbi tribal campfire and dinner.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Jungle Lodge in Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Welcome Drinks & Luxury Dinner.

days.title: KAZIRANGA JUNGLE SAFARI | TRACKING THE ONE-HORNED RHINO
days.description: Dawn private Central Range jeep safari tracking rhinos and buffaloes. Afternoon Western Range safari and Kaziranga Orchid National Biodiversity Park with 500+ orchid species.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kaziranga Jeep Safaris (Central & Western Zones), Orchid Park.
Photography Points: Kohora watchtowers overlooking sprawling water bodies.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Jungle Lodge in Kaziranga.
Meals Included: Buffet Breakfast & Themed Dinner.

days.title: BRAHMAPUTRA RIVER WATER ADVENTURE | RAFTING & DOLPHIN SPOTTING
days.description: Premium safety gear and certified river masters guide private rafts on Brahmaputra currents with Gangetic dolphin spotting and exclusive gourmet sand-island picnic lunch.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Brahmaputra Basin Rafting, Isolated Sand Island Exploration.
Optional Activities: Controlled river swimming, wildlife bird-watching from water channels.
Overnight Stay: Premium Riverside Boutique Property / Lodge.
Meals Included: Breakfast, Island Picnic Lunch, Dinner.

days.title: KAZIRANGA TO GUWAHATI | SUNSET CRUISE ON THE MIGHTY RIVER
days.description: Morning tea plantation nature walk then return to Guwahati ultra-luxury hotel. Spectacular sunset cruise with fine local teas, appetizers, and live acoustic regional music.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Guwahati Riverside Highway, Premium Brahmaputra Sunset Cruise.
Evening Experience: Live folk music and cultural showcase on-board.
Overnight Stay: Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Gourmet Dinner.

days.title: GUWAHATI EXPLORATION | SACRED SHRINES & GOLDEN SILK EXPEDITIONS
days.description: Priority VIP Kamakhya Temple visit, private speed-boat to Umananda Temple, and silk emporium hand-weaving of Assam Muga Silk with premium orthodox high tea.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kamakhya Temple (VIP Entry), Umananda River Island, Silk Weaving Centers.
Local Experience: High tea featuring handpicked single-estate Premium Assam Orthodox Tea.
Overnight Stay: Luxury Hotel in Guwahati.
Meals Included: Breakfast & Grand Farewell Dinner.

days.title: DEPARTURE | MEMORIES OF THE WILD VALLEY
days.description: Final gourmet terrace breakfast and private chauffeur transfer to Guwahati International Airport with tea blends and fine silks collected along the way.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Airport Transit Route.
Meals Included: Luxury Buffet Breakfast.

hotels.name: Infinity Oak Forest Resort / Borgos | Kiranshree Grand / Grand Majesty
hotels.description: OPTION 01 – DELUXE: Infinity Oak Forest Resort / Borgos (Kaziranga, 3N) | Kiranshree Grand / Grand Majesty (Guwahati, 2N) | Breakfast & Dinner (MAP)

hotels.name: Diphlu River Lodge (Standard) | Novotel Guwahati GS Road
hotels.description: OPTION 02 – PREMIUM: Diphlu River Lodge Standard (Kaziranga, 3N) | Novotel Guwahati GS Road (Guwahati, 2N) | Breakfast & Dinner (MAP)

hotels.name: The Iora Retreat / Diphlu River Luxury Cabin | Radisson Blu Hotel Guwahati
hotels.description: OPTION 03 – LUXURY: Iora Retreat / Diphlu River Luxury Cabin (Kaziranga, 3N) | Radisson Blu (Guwahati, 2N) | Gourmet Wilderness MAP

hotels.name: Bespoke Luxury Glamping Safari Tents | Vivanta Guwahati (Taj Group)
hotels.description: OPTION 04 – ULTRA LUXURY: Bespoke Luxury Glamping Safari Tents (Kaziranga, 3N) | Vivanta Guwahati Taj Group (Guwahati, 2N) | Signature Full Board Plan

inclusions.text: Bespoke Accommodations: Five nights at handpicked elite jungle resorts and luxury city hotels.
Luxury Fleet Transport: Complete itinerary via private 4x4 SUV with toll fees, parking, and driver logistics.
Wilderness Dinings: 05 multi-cuisine breakfasts and 05 chef-curated premium dinners.
TRAGUIN Support & Assistance: On-ground tracking coordinators and 24/7 dedicated telephone support.
Curated Adventure Assets: Private river rafting outfit rentals, professional guides, life jackets, and sand-island picnic.
Exclusive Privileges: VIP Kamakhya Temple assistance and private boat access to Umananda Island.
Welcome Amenities: Welcome drinks on arrival, traditional stoles, and complimentary Assam tea sample packs.
Air / Train Tickets: Inbound and outbound domestic or international travel tickets to Guwahati.
Entry Tickets: Camera fees and individual monument tickets not specified in the itinerary.
Personal Discretionary Expenses: Premium room service, laundry services, and telephone charges.
Insurance Coverage: Medical insurance or personal travel protection plans.
Optional Tours: Optional excursions or activities not listed in the day-by-day plan.
